story.i_want: Implement conversation accumulation pattern for retry logic when Devin session resumption is not viable
story.so_that: Failed verification steps can be retried with full conversation context, allowing agents to see and fix previous errors

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: File naming is clear and self-documenting
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given state files, When examined, Then file names (input.txt, output.txt, verification.txt) clearly indicate their purpose

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing saga execution flow preserved (no breaking changes)
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given existing sagas, When executed with new code, Then they continue to work without modification

related_edge_cases.criterion: Node directory already exists from previous saga run
related_edge_cases.gherkin: Given node directory exists from previous saga, When new saga runs same node, Then new attempt subdirectory is created with incremented number
Given attempt subdirectory exists but files are incomplete, When retry logic checks for next attempt, Then next attempt number is correctly determined

steps.description: Design and document the new directory structure (.sagas/<saga-id>/<node-name>/attempt_<N>/) and file layout (input.txt, output.txt, verification.txt)
Create unit tests for directory structure creation and file writing
Create unit tests for attempt number determination logic
Create integration tests for backward compatibility with existing sagas

documentation: docs/reqs/fix-devin-resume/fix-devin-resume-retry-logic.design.json - Design document with file structure specification
